full_book.name: Complete Monograph (Markdown)
full_book.description: The complete Quantum Braid Dynamics monograph in clean, standard Markdown format, starting with a Table of Contents and full book title. Best for direct copy-pasting or model ingestion.

full_book.name: Complete Monograph (Structured JSON)
full_book.description: Highly structured JSON representation of the entire text including Table of Contents. Segregated neatly into introduction, parts, chapters, and sections.

full_book.name: Complete Monograph (PDF)
full_book.description: Beautiful, publication-ready PDF containing the full monograph assembled (typeset professionally with Title page, Abstract, full Bibliography citations, and Footers).

parts.name: Part 1: The Foundational Principles (The Rules)
parts.description: Contains the compiled text and equations for Part 1: The Foundational Principles (The Rules).

parts.name: Part 2: Topological Nature of Matter (The Players)
parts.description: Contains the compiled text and equations for Part 2: Topological Nature of Matter (The Players).

parts.name: Part 3: Emergent Reality (The Stage)
parts.description: Contains the compiled text and equations for Part 3: Emergent Reality (The Stage).

parts.name: Part 4: Phenomenological Consequences (The Output)
parts.description: Contains the compiled text and equations for Part 4: Phenomenological Consequences (The Output).

parts.name: Part 5: Applications and Synthesis (Conclusion)
parts.description: Contains the compiled text and equations for Part 5: Applications and Synthesis (Conclusion).

parts.name: Part 6: Appendices
parts.description: Contains the compiled text and equations for Part 6: Appendices.

model.name: config.py
model.description: System configs, boundary conditions, and global physics constants.

model.name: dynamics.py
model.description: Core simulation of quantum braiding dynamics, vertex updates, and transition models.

model.name: graph_setup.py
model.description: Initialization of the lattice graph, causal set creation, and adjacency lists.

model.name: observables.py
model.description: Calculating network observables, entanglement entropy, and graph-theoretical energy.

model.name: qecc.py
model.description: Topological Quantum Error Correcting Code (QECC) calculations and estimators.

model.name: utils.py
model.description: Helper methods for graph parsing, visualization export, and data conversion.

simulations.name: find_vacuum.py
simulations.description: Simulated annealing and global path searches for stable vacuum structures.

simulations.name: run_ensemble.py
simulations.description: Parallelized execution coordinator for ensemble statistical network convergence.
